findings.title: Privacy guard misses raw text in classKey
findings.evidence: assertCorpusPrivacy only rejects a 16-hex fingerprint in classKey at shadow-replay-corpus.ts:119 and then only checks allowed field names at :122-123. The tests cover a fingerprint classKey at shadow-replay-corpus-privacy.vitest.ts:86-102, but a classKey like `class:fix_bug:SENSITIVE-bananaphone-7f3` with a valid static syntheticQuery would currently pass the guard.
findings.recommendation: Validate classKey exactly equals `class:${intent}:${resultCountClass}` and add a negative SENTINEL-in-classKey test.

findings.title: Cancel test does not prove cancellation prevents indexing
findings.evidence: The cancel test parks before worker execution at handler-memory-index-scan-jobs.vitest.ts:371-375, requests cancel at :389, releases at :392, and only asserts terminal cancelled state plus lease release at :393-394. It never asserts `mockIndexMemoryFile` or mtime updates stayed untouched, so removing the pre-file cancellation guard in memory-index.ts:975-978 would still let this test pass after indexing the file.
findings.recommendation: After releasing the gate and observing cancellation, assert `mockIndexMemoryFile` and `mockBatchUpdateMtimes` were not called for this pre-file cancellation case; optionally add a multi-file partial-cancel case.

findings.title: SQLITE_BUSY test does not exercise UPDATE retry
findings.evidence: The test uses one global `writeCallCount` and two failures at job-store.vitest.ts:69-80. `createMaintenanceJob` at :94 consumes both injected SQLITE_BUSY failures, so `setJobState` at :99 runs after the counter has already exceeded `FAILURES_BEFORE_SUCCESS`; removing retry from UPDATE paths would not fail this test.
findings.recommendation: Split INSERT and UPDATE busy injection or reset/use per-SQL counters before `setJobState` so an UPDATE throws SQLITE_BUSY before succeeding.

title: Privacy guard misses raw text in classKey
evidence: assertCorpusPrivacy only rejects a 16-hex fingerprint in classKey at shadow-replay-corpus.ts:119 and then only checks allowed field names at :122-123. The tests cover a fingerprint classKey at shadow-replay-corpus-privacy.vitest.ts:86-102, but a classKey like `class:fix_bug:SENSITIVE-bananaphone-7f3` with a valid static syntheticQuery would currently pass the guard.
recommendation: Validate classKey exactly equals `class:${intent}:${resultCountClass}` and add a negative SENTINEL-in-classKey test.

evidence: The cancel test parks before worker execution at handler-memory-index-scan-jobs.vitest.ts:371-375, requests cancel at :389, releases at :392, and only asserts terminal cancelled state plus lease release at :393-394. recommendation: After releasing the gate and observing cancellation, assert `mockIndexMemoryFile` and `mockBatchUpdateMtimes` were not called for this pre-file cancellation case; optionally add a multi-file partial-cancel case.

evidence: The test uses one global `writeCallCount` and two failures at job-store.vitest.ts:69-80. `createMaintenanceJob` at :94 consumes both injected SQLITE_BUSY failures, so `setJobState` at :99 runs after the counter has already exceeded `FAILURES_BEFORE_SUCCESS`; removing retry from UPDATE paths would not fail this test.
recommendation: Split INSERT and UPDATE busy injection or reset/use per-SQL counters before `setJobState` so an UPDATE throws SQLITE_BUSY before succeeding.
